description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a rectangular, slim profile and rounded corners, featuring a large touchscreen display that dominates the front surface. The screen is currently active, displaying a web browser with the Google search page and a virtual keyboard, indicating touch interaction capability. The device has a dark-colored edge frame, likely made of metal or plastic, and a light-colored front surface, possibly glass. A circular home button is visible below the display, suggesting a physical input mechanism. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible external case or cover, and the back and sides appear smooth and unadorned. There are no visible brand logos or camera modules on the surfaces shown.
description: A slim, rectangular smartphone with a large touchscreen displaying a Google search page and a virtual keyboard, featuring a circular home button below the screen and a dark edge frame.
description_view_0: The phone is seen from a low side angle, highlighting its thin profile, dark edge, and the active screen with a visible home button.
description_view_1: The phone is viewed from the front, clearly showing the touchscreen with the Google search page, virtual keyboard, and the circular home button.
description_view_2: The phone is seen from the opposite side, again emphasizing the slimness, dark edge, and the active display with the home button.
description_view_3: The phone is viewed from the top, showing the upper part of the screen with the Google logo and search bar, and the dark edge frame.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a web browser with the Google search page, a search bar, the Google logo, and a virtual keyboard at the bottom. No app icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_button_layout: One circular home button centered below the screen; no other physical buttons are visible.
